title: ranunculus petiolaris var. standleyi
intro: Ranunculus petiolaris var. standleyi, commonly known as Standley's buttercup, is a perennial plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) that is native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Standley's buttercup include its potential to treat various conditions, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Standley's buttercup can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
